name: youtube-downloader-desktop
description: A modern desktop application for downloading YouTube videos and playlists

scripts.test:syntax: node -c src/main/main.js && node -c src/preload/preload.js && node -c src/renderer/js/renderer.js
scripts.validate: npm run test:syntax && npm audit --audit-level moderate
scripts.dist:package: powershell -Command "$version = (Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version; Compress-Archive -Path 'build/YouTube Downloader $version.exe', 'build/Enhanced-Install-YouTube-Downloader.bat', 'build/README-DISTRIBUTION.md' -DestinationPath "YouTube-Downloader-Desktop-v$version-COMPLETE.zip" -Force; Write-Host "Distribution package created: YouTube-Downloader-Desktop-v$version-COMPLETE.zip" -ForegroundColor Green"
scripts.dist:verify: powershell -Command "$version = (Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version; $zipFile = "YouTube-Downloader-Desktop-v$version-COMPLETE.zip"; if (Test-Path $zipFile) { $size = [math]::Round((Get-Item $zipFile).Length / 1MB, 2); Write-Host "✓ Distribution package verified: $zipFile ($size MB)" -ForegroundColor Green; Expand-Archive -Path $zipFile -DestinationPath "temp-verify" -Force; $contents = Get-ChildItem "temp-verify" -Recurse | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Host "Package contents:" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $contents | Format-Table -AutoSize; Remove-Item "temp-verify" -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Host "✗ Distribution package not found: $zipFile" -ForegroundColor Red }"
scripts.dist:create: npm run dist:clean && npm run build:win && npm run dist:package && npm run dist:verify

author: YouTube Downloader Team
